SCADA Standards Appendix A ­
Definitions and General Reference 
January 2025 
22
artifact_summary: Document page mapping ISA alphabetical characters to engineering variables, modifiers, and functions for SCADA systems.
artifact_blurb: This document page presents a structured reference table adhering to ISA-5.5 standards, detailing the nomenclature for SCADA system variables. It systematically maps alphabetical characters (A-Z) to specific engineering parameters such as pressure and temperature, alongside associated modifiers and functional indicators including alarm states.
